Package de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.equality

    Description

  • Class
    Description
    EqualsModProperty<T>
    Interface to check for equality ignoring given properties and to compute according hash codes.
    IrrelevantTermLabelsProperty
    A property that can be used in EqualsModProperty.equalsModProperty(Object, Property, Object[]) for terms.
    ProofIrrelevancyProperty
    A property that can be used in EqualsModProperty.equalsModProperty(Object, Property, Object[]) for terms.

    A property that can be used in EqualsModProperty.equalsModProperty(Object, Property, Object[]) for terms.
